title: Marauder (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Enfys_Nests_Marauder_Conv.png|thumb|right|250px|One of Enfys Nest's marauders]]
'''Marauder''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''Marauder''', another term for '''[[pirate]]'''
*The '''[[Marauder (Arquitens-class command cruiser)|''Marauder'']]''', an [[Arquitens-class command cruiser|''Arquitens''-class command cruiser]]
*The '''[[Marauder (Firespray-31-class)|''Marauder'']]''', a [[Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft|''Firespray-31''-class patrol and attack craft]]
*The [[Marauder (frigate)|'''''Marauder''''']], a [[frigate]]
*The '''[[Marauder (Omicron-class)|''Marauder'']]''', an [[Omicron-class attack shuttle|''Omicron''-class attack shuttle]] used by [[Clone Force 99]]
*The '''[[Marauder (Weequay pirate ship)|''Marauder'']]''', a [[Weequay pirate ship]]
*'''[[Q'anah's Marauders]]''', a pirate gang
*The '''[[Trexler 906 Armored Marauder]]''', a ground transport vehicle used by the [[Galactic Empire]]
*The '''[[UEV-M1 Marauder engineer squad carrier]]''', a ground transport vehicle used by the [[Alliance Corps of Engineers/Legends|Alliance Corps of Engineers]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Organizations===
*'''[[Dark side marauder]]s''', a class of [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] warriors
*'''[[Marauders (swoop gang)|Marauders]]''', a [[swoop]] gang
*'''[[Marauders (White Maw)|Marauders]]''', a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group
*The '''[[Sanyassan Marauders]]''', a pirate group
*'''[[Sith Marauder]]s''', a class of [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] warriors

===Starships===
*'''''[[Marauder (Acclamator-class)|Marauder]]''''', an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]]
*'''''[[Marauder (Ardent-class)|Marauder]]''''', an [[Ardent-class fast frigate|''Ardent''-class fast frigate]], of the [[First Coruscant Task Force]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]
*'''''[[Marauder (Warrior-class)|Marauder]]''''', a [[Warrior-class gunship|''Warrior''-class gunship]] of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]
*'''''[[Marauder (Weequay pirate ship)/Legends|Marauder]]''''', a [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] ship during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*'''''[[Marauder Starjacker]]''''', a pirate ship commanded by [[Finhead Stonebone]] circa [[3999 BBY]]
*'''[[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]]''', a small [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] used from the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] through to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]

===Other===
*'''[[Kaox Krul]]''', a Sith warrior known as '''The Marauder'''
*'''[[Marauder racing swoop]]''', a type of swoop bike
